case_title: TIFFANY CULJIS VS. UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MALPRACTICE - MEDICAL/DENTAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CULJIS, TIFFANY AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-15-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-31-2012
DECLARATION OF TIFFANY CULJIS TO THE COURT'S OSC RE FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CULJIS, TIFFANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-24-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-24-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-24-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-15-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CULJIS, TIFFANY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-26-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
